title: Cozy's Improved Cats
description: A complete upgrade of pet cats ✰ Pet cats have personality, helpful abilities, and can be respawned!
body:
![All Cat Variants - Tamed and Named](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbaa710f185fc541d7b803695826d07667aea1d1_0.webp)

# Cozy's Improved Cats (Now Available for Forge!)

Make every cat into a real companion. Build bond and affinity through care, unlock class abilities, and keep your friend safe with revival collars. Adds personality, progression, and soul-bound loyalty.

**Bring your cats to life. Build stories. Form bonds.**

If you’ve ever loved a Minecraft cat, this is the mod that will make them feel alive — forever. ✧

[![Available on CurseForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cozys-improved-cats)
[![Available on Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozys-improved-cats)
![Available for Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png)
![Available for Forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_64h.png) 
[![Join the Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/9u4dnSpyjJ)

> **📖 Wiki / Full Feature Guide → https://cozysimprovedmobs.netlify.app/**

## Why Players Install
- **Never lose a best friend**: Tamed cats drop a Cat Collar into their owner's inventory on death; Use it on a block to revive your cat. No more needing to leave your pets at home for safety.
- **Bonding that matters**: Petting and scratching your cat (sneak + right click with an open hand), feeding them, and sticking together  deepen your bond and unlock stronger companionship.
- **Unique companions**: Randomized stats, class type, favorite food to discover, gender (optional), and class.
- **Class abilities**: Naiad, Guardian, Witchling, Dreamer, Lucky - powers scale with affinity.
- **Expressive behavior**: Cats emote based on weather, time, and their bond with their owner. They react to the world, teleport smartly, show affection, and follow when tempted with food.
- **Multiplayer friendly**: Optional friendly-fire protection and owner-only breeding.

## How It Works
- **Automatic upgrade**: Vanilla cats become Improved Cats (keeps name, variant, owner, collar color).
- **Custom taming**: Use **Ancient Cod/Salmon** (rare drops from cod/salmon or fisherman trades). Vanilla fish taming can be enabled in config.
- **Stat inspection**: Sneak + right-click a tamed cat with a **Training String** to view stats.

## Classes & Abilities
- **Naiad**: Short burst of regeneration (with cooldown) when you're low on health; affinity grows in water and sunlight.
- **Guardian**: Short burst of resistance (with cooldown) when you take damage; glows near creepers or phantoms.
- **Witchling**: Gifts potion items; affinity grows near brewing stands or with status effects.
- **Dreamer**: Stores XP and delivers Bottles o' Enchanting.
- **Lucky**: Keeps Luck I on you while nearby.

## Items
- **Ancient Cod / Ancient Salmon** (and cooked variants)
- **Training String**
- **Cat Collar**

## Compatibility & Requirements
- **Loader**: Fabric, Forge
- **Minecraft**: 1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.5-1.21.11
- **Required (Fabric)**: Fabric API, Cloth Config
- **Optional (Fabric)**: Mod Menu (for in-game config UI)

## Configuration
- Config file: `config/cozys-improved-cats.json`
- Reload command: `/reloadcozycatsconfig` (server operators)

## ⚠️ Important: Read Before Installing on Existing Worlds

This mod replaces vanilla cats with **custom cat entities** in order to support its features (personality, abilities, respawn system, etc.).

### Uninstall warning

If you **remove this mod** and then load your world, cats that were converted/managed by this mod may **disappear permanently** because the custom entity no longer exists without the mod installed.

### Before uninstalling

* **Back up your world first**
* Do **not** open the world without the mod unless you accept the risk of losing modded cats
* If you already removed the mod and loaded the world, recovery may only be possible from a **backup**
